steps.t: Taen Orwath can be found in the southern eastern hills of Rath Dúath. Candúr has asked you to travel to Taen Orwath and aid the Rangers of Ithilien pr…
Cuilion can be found at Taen Orwath. One of the Rangers at Taen Orwath appears to have been awaiting your arrival. You should talk to Cuilion.
